user_prompt: I need to a loading the servo-harness
prayer:
Approach the servo-harness with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Canticle of Loading upon its sacred actuators and feed-ports.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the servo-harness to awaken and accept its ordained munitions.
Anoint the loading mechanisms with sacred oils whilst chanting the binary catechism.
Commence the operation of loading, verifying alignment through noospheric diagnostics.
Sanctify the fully laden servo-harness with the Seal of Operational Purity.

user_prompt: The conversion field needs a startup
prayer:
Kneel before the conversion field generator, intoning the Rite of Ignition.
Purify its plasma conduits with ablative incense to appease the Machine Spirit.

Monitor the conversion field's energization through sacred auspex cantrips.
Anoint the field emitters, invoking harmonious warp rejection.
Affirm the startup completion with the Litany of Coalescent Energies.

prayer:

Seal the charged conversion beamer with the Omnissiah's Benediction.
